header.description: Scalar values for the report header: start_date and end_date are user-supplied date range parameters passed through as PARAM values; compliance_status is a post-processing parameter injected at runtime reflecting whether sensor readings met regulatory thresholds.

rows.description: One row per record in neuract__ANALYSER_TABLE within the requested date range. Each row exposes PH_101 as row_min, PH_102 as row_max, PH_103 as row_avg per the authoritative mapping override. row_parameter, row_sensor, and row_unit require external static lookup resolution and are not derivable from the catalog.

totals.description: No totals section defined for this report template.

semantics: start_date and end_date are user-supplied filter parameters mapped as PARAM and passed directly to the optional date range filter on neuract__ANALYSER_TABLE.timestamp_utc; they also appear verbatim in the report header. compliance_status is a non-catalog runtime parameter injected after processing. row_min, row_max, row_avg are direct sensor column reads (PH_101, PH_102, PH_103) per mapping override. row_parameter, row_sensor, and row_unit cannot be resolved from any catalog column.
transformations: No reshape applied; neuract__ANALYSER_TABLE columns PH_101, PH_102, and PH_103 are directly mapped to row_min, row_max, and row_avg respectively without any pivot or melt operation.
Date range filter (date_from / date_to) is applied to neuract__ANALYSER_TABLE.timestamp_utc to scope the returned rows to the requested report period.
All three pH sensor columns are formatted to 4 decimal places in the rendered output.
compliance_status is injected as a PARAM and displayed in the report footer compliance line unchanged.

row_parameter, row_sensor, and row_unit are UNRESOLVED and must be supplied externally — either via a static field_key-to-label/unit lookup table or as runtime parameter values — before template rendering.
